headline: Super for busy executives who want a real personal assistant

site_brief.audience: busy executives who want a real personal assistant
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.

site_brief.title: Super for busy executives who want a real personal assistant

summary: A cinematic, conversion‑focused niche landing page positioning Super as the sharper alternative for executives who need a personal AI agent that actually operates computers, safely reuses a computer‑use cache, and handles repeated executive workflows end‑to‑end. Built with the same visual and structural system as Super’s successful comparison pages, grounded in current reporting on agentic AI, executive productivity, and computer‑use assistants.
